title: EFT Level 3 & Matrix Reimprinting
description: A Level 3 training led by Karl Dawson in Kochi.

aboutParagraphs.content: All EFTMRA courses are taught live, in person. This is essential. EFT and Matrix Reimprinting involve trauma-informed work, emotional safety, and skilled supervision. In-person training allows for real feedback, guided experiential practice, and the human connection that simply cannot be replicated online. EFTMRA training goes far beyond learning tapping sequences. You’ll be taught how to work safely with trauma, inner-child healing, core belief change, and how to help clients create deep, lasting transformation at the source, not just temporary relief.

outcomes.label: Direct training with Karl Dawson, ensuring accuracy, integrity, and authenticity
Fully live, in-person courses, prioritising student safety and real skill development

trainerRole: Director of Training for the EFT and Matrix Reimprinting Academy (EFTMRA)
trainerBio: Director of Training for the EFT and Matrix Reimprinting Academy (EFTMRA), the world’s largest EFT certification body, with over 10,000 practitioners worldwide. EFTMRA trainers and practitioners span Europe, North and South America, Asia, and Australia, forming a truly global healing community.

title: EFT Level 1 & 2 Training
description: A Level 1 & 2 training led by Leena R Haldar in Mumbai.
trainerBio: Leena Haldar, an interior designer by profession, designing premium homes and projects for the hospitality industry, builders, corporate offices in India, Dubai and Africa. She also developed curriculum and taught generic skills at the Rizvi College of Hotel Management for few years.

title: Rewrite your past, transform your Future
description: A Matrix Reimprinting training led by Leena R Haldar in Mumbai.

title: Matrix Reimprinting Practitioner Certification
description: A Matrix Reimprinting training led by Mridula Nair in Bangalore.
trainerBio: Mridula is a counselor and practitioner in several alternative therapies like Bach Flower Remedies, NLP, and Breakthrough Coaching with Timeline Technology. She is an experienced and successful trainer in EFT and Matrix Reimprinting. Trained by Karl Dawson, the Founder of EFTMRA U.K. and the founder of Matrix Reimprinting, she has become a prominent figure in EFT and human behaviour for healing emotional trauma. She leads EFTMRA India and is a Master Trainer of Trainers.

title: Emotional Freedom Technique (Level 1&2)
description: A Level 1 & 2 training led by Dr Shilpa Gupta in New Delhi.
trainerRole: Therapist & EFT Master Trainer Founder, EmoAid Wellness Center Associate Director, CCAW
trainerBio: Dr. Shilpa Gupta is a renowned parenting and an emotional well-being coach with over 13 years of experience in imparting training through various workshops and seminars. She is an ENT surgeon who diversified into her passion of working with parents and adults on Communication and Emotions. In addition to her consultancy, she is also the Founder and Trainer of EmoAid programme and Associate Director of Centre for Child and Adolescent Wellbeing (CCAW), a multi-specialty Institute for child mental health.

title: EFT 3 Advanced EFT skills
description: A Level 3 training led by Leena R Haldar in Mumbai.

title: International Certification Matrix Reimprinting
description: A Matrix Reimprinting training led by Dr Shilpa Gupta in New Delhi.
trainerRole: Therapist & EFT Master Trainer Founder, EmoAid Wellness Center Associate Director, CCAW

title: EFT 3 Advanced Training
description: A Level 3 training led by Diksha Wadhwa in Thane.

aboutParagraphs.content: This training is delivered through EFTMRA India's internationally aligned curriculum, combining practical tapping tools, trauma-aware teaching, and a clear pathway into deeper professional practice.
Participants leave with structured next steps, practice guidance, and access to the wider EFTMRA learning community so the training continues to support their growth beyond the room.

outcomes.label: A clear understanding of the methods taught in this training
Hands-on practice with guided supervision and feedback
Confidence applying the work ethically and appropriately
A practical next-step plan for certification or continued study
